/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects CMakeFiles/tokenizer_server_crow.dir/server_crow.cpp.o -o bpe_server_crow  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../libbpe_tokenizer.a -lpthread ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
